mapper.select:
SELECT i.issue_code, i.project_code, i.status_code, i.title, i.description, i.priority, i.assignee_code, i.created_by_code, i.created_at, i.due_at, i.started_at, i.resolved_at, i.updated_at, i.progress, i.position, i.file_code,
p.project_name,
cs.code_name AS status_name, cp.code_name AS priority_name,
ua.name AS assignee_name, uc.name AS creator_name,
i.type_code, t.type_name
FROM issues i LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.code_id = s.code_id AND cs.group_code = 'OB'
LEFT JOIN common_code cp ON cp.code_id = i.priority AND cp.group_code = 'OA'
LEFT JOIN users ua ON ua.user_code = i.assignee_code LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.user_code = i.created_by_code LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{userCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND ( (v.admin_ck = 'Y' AND v.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (NVL(v.admin_ck,'N') = 'N' AND v.status = 'OD1') ) )
AND i.project_code = #{projectCode}
ORDER BY i.issue_code DESC

SELECT i.issue_code, i.project_code, i.status_code, i.title, i.description, i.priority, i.assignee_code, i.created_by_code, i.created_at, i.due_at, i.started_at, i.resolved_at, i.updated_at, i.progress, i.position, i.file_code,
i.par_issue_code, pi.title as par_issue_title,
s.code_id AS status_id,
p.project_name,
cs.code_name AS status_name, cp.code_name AS priority_name,
ua.name AS assignee_name, uc.name AS creator_name,
ad.original_name, ad.path AS file_path, at.uploaded_at,
i.type_code, t.type_name
FROM issues i LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code
JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.code_id = s.code_id AND cs.group_code = 'OB'
LEFT JOIN common_code cp ON cp.code_id = i.priority AND cp.group_code = 'OA'
LEFT JOIN users ua ON ua.user_code = i.assignee_code
LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.user_code = i.created_by_code
LEFT JOIN attachments_detail ad ON ad.file_code = i.file_code AND ad.is_used = 1
LEFT JOIN attachments at ON at.file_code = ad.file_code
LEFT JOIN issues pi ON i.par_issue_code = pi.issue_code
LEFT JOIN types t ON t.type_code = i.type_code
WHERE i.issue_code = #{issueCode}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(issue_code), 0) + 1 FROM issues
INSERT INTO issues
issue_code, project_code, status_code, title, created_by_code, created_at,
type_code,
description,
priority,
assignee_code,
due_at,
progress,
par_issue_code,
VALUES
#{issueCode}, #{projectCode},
(SELECT s.status_code FROM status s WHERE s.project_code = #{projectCode} AND s.code_id = #{statusId}),
#{title}, #{createdByCode}, SYSTIMESTAMP,
#{typeCode},
#{description},
#{priority},
#{assigneeCode},
#{dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{progress},
#{parIssueCode}
mapper.update:
UPDATE issues
title = #{issue.title}, description = #{issue.description}, priority = #{issue.priority},
par_issue_code = #{issue.parIssueCode},
par_issue_code = NULL,
assignee_code = #{issue.assigneeCode},
status_code = ( SELECT s.status_code FROM status s WHERE s.project_code = #{issue.projectCode} AND s.code_id = #{issue.statusId} ),
due_at = #{issue.dueAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
started_at = #{issue.startedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
resolved_at = #{issue.resolvedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
progress = #{issue.progress},
type_code = #{issue.typeCode},
updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE issue_code = #{issueCode} AND (#{issue.parIssueCode} IS NULL OR #{issue.parIssueCode} != #{issueCode})
